name: Vector2d
summary: Represents the two components of a vector in two-dimensional space, using Double-precision floating point numbers.

constructors.name: Vector2d
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the vector based on two, X and Y, components.

methods.name: Add
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Add(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Sums up two vectors. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the + operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that results from the component-wise addition of the two vectors.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.signature: public int CompareTo(Vector2d other)
methods.summary: Compares this Vector2d with another Vector2d. Components evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other Vector2d to use in comparison.

returns.doc: 0: if this is identical to other-1: if this.X < other.X-1: if this.X == other.X and this.Y < other.Y+1: otherwise.

methods.name: Divide
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Divide(Vector2d vector, double t)
methods.summary: Divides a Vector2d by a number, having the effect of shrinking it. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the / operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that is component-wise divided by t.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Vector2d other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Vector2d.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Vector2d,System.Double)"]

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.signature: public override bool Equals(Object obj)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified System.Object is a Vector2d and has the same value as the present vector.

returns.doc: true if obj is Vector2d and has the same components as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Vector2d)
methods.signature: public bool Equals(Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified vector has the same value as the present vector.

returns.doc: true if vector has the same components as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.signature: public override int GetHashCode()
methods.summary: Provides a hashing value for the present vector.

returns.doc: A non-unique number based on vector components.

methods.name: IsTiny()
methods.signature: public bool IsTiny()
methods.summary: Uses RhinoMath.ZeroTolerance for IsTiny calculation.

returns.doc: true if vector is very small, otherwise false.

methods.name: IsTiny(Double)
methods.signature: public bool IsTiny(double tolerance)
methods.summary: Determines whether a vector is very short.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: A nonzero value used as the coordinate zero tolerance. .

returns.doc: (Math.Abs(X) <= tiny_tol) AND (Math.Abs(Y) <= tiny_tol) AND (Math.Abs(Z) <= tiny_tol).

methods.name: Multiply(Double, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Multiply(double t, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Multiplies a vector by a number, having the effect of scaling it. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that is the original vector coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Multiply(Vector2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static double Multiply(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Multiplies two vectors together, returning the dot product (or inner product). (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A value that results from the evaluation of v1.X*v2.X + v1.Y*v2.Y. This value equals v1.Length * v2.Length * cos(alpha), where alpha is the angle between vectors.

methods.name: Multiply(Vector2d, Double)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Multiply(Vector2d vector, double t)
methods.summary: Multiplies a vector by a number, having the effect of scaling it. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that is the original vector coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Negate
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Negate(Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Computes the reversed vector. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the - unary operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector where all components were multiplied by -1.

methods.name: Rotate
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angleRadians)
methods.summary: Rotates this vector.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Subtract
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Subtract(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Subtracts the second vector from the first one. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the - operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that results from the component-wise difference of vector1 - vector2.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.signature: public override string ToString()
methods.summary: Constructs a string representation of the current vector.

returns.doc: A string in the form X,Y.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Unitize
methods.signature: public bool Unitize()
methods.summary: Unitizes the vector in place. A unit vector has length 1 unit. An invalid or zero length vector cannot be unitized.

returns.doc: true on success or false on failure.

methods.name: Addition
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator +(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Sums up two vectors.

returns.doc: A new vector that results from the component-wise addition of the two vectors.

methods.name: Division
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator /(Vector2d vector, double t)
methods.summary: Divides a Vector2d by a number, having the effect of shrinking it.

returns.doc: A new vector that is component-wise divided by t.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two vectors have equal values.

returns.doc: true if components of the two vectors are pairwise equal; otherwise false.

methods.name: GreaterThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator >(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified vector comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second vector. Components have decreasing evaluation priority: first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is larger than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GreaterThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator >=(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified vector comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second vector, or it is equal to it. Components have decreasing evaluation priority: first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y >= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two vectors have different values.

returns.doc: true if any component of the two vectors is pairwise different; otherwise false.

methods.name: LessThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator <(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified vector comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second vector. Components have decreasing evaluation priority: first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is smaller than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: LessThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator <=(Vector2d a, Vector2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified vector comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second vector, or it is equal to it. Components have decreasing evaluation priority: first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y <= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Multiply(Double, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator *(double t, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Multiplies a vector by a number, having the effect of scaling it.

returns.doc: A new vector that is the original vector coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Multiply(Vector2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static double operator *(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Multiplies two vectors together, returning the dot product (or inner product).

returns.doc: A value that results from the evaluation of v1.X*v2.X + v1.Y*v2.Y. This value equals v1.Length * v2.Length * cos(alpha), where alpha is the angle between vectors.

methods.name: Multiply(Vector2d, Double)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator *(Vector2d vector, double t)
methods.summary: Multiplies a vector by a number, having the effect of scaling it.

returns.doc: A new vector that is the original vector coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Subtraction
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator -(Vector2d vector1, Vector2d vector2)
methods.summary: Subtracts the second vector from the first one.

returns.doc: A new vector that results from the component-wise difference of vector1 - vector2.

methods.name: UnaryNegation
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator -(Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Computes the opposite vector.

returns.doc: A new vector where all components were multiplied by -1.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this vector is valid. A valid vector must be formed of valid component values for x, y and z.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Computes the length (or magnitude, or size) of this vector. This is an application of Pythagoras' theorem.

properties.name: SquareLength
properties.summary: Returns the square of the length of the vector.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets the value of the vector with components set as RhinoMath.UnsetValue,RhinoMath.UnsetValue.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X (first) component of this vector.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y (second) component of this vector.

properties.name: Zero
properties.summary: Gets the value of the vector with components 0,0.
